method: Multi-frame fit of MuJoCo arm_link3/arm_link5 centres to episode_000000 robot joints, followed by full-mesh visual verification.
limitations: RoboCOIN does not publish camera intrinsics, lens distortion, or head-camera extrinsics. This is a fitted pinhole calibration; residual outline differences include lens distortion and convex-hull-versus-production-shell geometry.
